data.executiveSummary: The payment-api experienced high memory usage and a subsequent increase in error rates due to external API latency spikes that resulted in the exhaustion of the connection pool.

rootCause.title: External API Latency Spike
rootCause.description: Repeated occurrences of GatewayException indicate that the payment-api faced external API latency spikes, leading to exhaustion of the connection pool, which resulted in increased error rates.

evidenceChain: Loki logs reveal repeated 'GatewayException in payment-api: External API latency spike detected. Connection pool exhausted.' messages.

timeline.event: GatewayException in payment-api: External API latency spike detected. Connection pool exhausted.
GatewayException in payment-api: External API latency spike detected. Connection pool exhausted.
GatewayException in payment-api: External API latency spike detected. Connection pool exhausted.

data.impact: Users experienced higher error rates and potential delays in transactions due to the service being unable to handle incoming requests efficiently.
recommendedActions: Investigate and optimize the performance of the external APIs to reduce latency spikes.
Review and increase the capacity of the connection pool to handle spikes more effectively.
Implement monitoring for connection pool exhaustion to alert on similar issues proactively.
